note: Fixed documented prior — NOT fitted to outcomes (SIGNAL_SPEC.md §4). The composite is an uncalibrated mixture, never a validated forecast; it never replaces the crowd or QEST numbers, and the scored ledger number stays QEST until the composite earns a resolved track record. regimeAdjustment weight is 0.0: the crypto regime adjustment is computed as a candidate but contributes nothing until calibrated.
